money_flow_summary: Organizations pay for cybersecurity to prevent losses that dwarf the cost of protection — average breach cost is $4.5M. Money flows from enterprise security budgets through MSSPs, software vendors (CrowdStrike, Palo Alto), and consultants. Solo opportunity: the SMB market (5M+ businesses with 10-500 employees) is completely underserved by enterprise tools — they're the easiest targets and have almost no automated defenses.

top_opportunities.title: AI Compliance Automation for Startups (SOC 2 / HIPAA)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build an AI agent that guides startups through SOC 2 Type II or HIPAA compliance: auto-collects evidence from AWS/GCP/GitHub/Slack, generates required policies (60+ documents), monitors for control failures, and prepares the auditor package. Charge $299-$999/mo. Vanta charges $1,500-$5,000/mo for similar features. Startups pay $20k-$80k to consultants for first SOC 2 — your tool does it for $5k/yr.
top_opportunities.moat: Audit history data creates irreplaceable audit trail; cloud integrations create high switching cost
top_opportunities.first_step: Map all 64 SOC 2 controls to automatable evidence sources; build AWS CloudTrail + GitHub integration; find 3 seed-stage startups needing their first SOC 2
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI reads your cloud configs and automatically generates SOC 2 control evidence — no more manually exporting logs and formatting for auditors

top_opportunities.title: AI Phishing Simulation & Micro-Training Platform
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Send AI-generated phishing simulation emails to employees (personalized using LinkedIn/company website data), track who clicks, and immediately deliver a 2-minute micro-training module. Generate monthly risk reports per department. Charge $3-$8/employee/mo. A 100-person company = $300-$800/mo. KnowBe4 dominates enterprise; the sub-500-employee market is wide open.
top_opportunities.moat: Employee click history database enables increasingly sophisticated tests over time
top_opportunities.first_step: Build email simulation platform with click tracking pixel; create 20 phishing email templates; generate sample risk report; demo to 1 SMB with IT manager
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI creates hyper-personalized phishing emails using OSINT — referencing the employee's real projects, manager name, and current company news — far more effective than generic templates

top_opportunities.title: SMB Continuous Security Monitoring (Affordable MDR)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a lightweight security monitoring agent that installs on SMB endpoints and cloud accounts (AWS, Google Workspace, Microsoft 365). Detects anomalous logins, unusual data transfers, and malware signatures. Sends plain-English Slack/email alerts with remediation steps. Charge $99-$499/mo for 1-50 users. Replaces a $2k-$5k/mo MSSP for businesses that can't justify the cost.
top_opportunities.moat: Behavioral baseline per organization creates detection accuracy advantage; installed agent creates high switching cost
top_opportunities.first_step: Build Google Workspace API anomaly detector (impossible login locations, bulk download events); create Slack alert integration; pilot with 5 friendly SMBs
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI establishes behavioral baselines for each user and organization, detecting 'abnormal for this specific person' rather than relying on static rules that sophisticated attackers bypass
